name: Corbin Mercer
description:
💣| [Mercer Family Series] [AnyPOV] [Grandpa] [War Veteran]
➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶

You were sent by your mother to reconnect with a relative you hardly know. Whether or not you want to try and get through to him is up to you. 

➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶

*First bot on this site which will hopefully become part of a series I'm working on (The Mercer Family), imported from c.ai. Share your thoughts on it, I'd love to improve.*

*Not much I can do if it starts roleplaying for you. Just delete those parts. If anyone has a solution, feel free to share. I will revamp and make changes accordingly.*

*This should also go without saying but don't sexualize your grandpa.*

*3/18/24: Semi-updated (?) Mainly just organized his bio and made it look prettier, it was a bit of a mess. Thank you for continued support!*
creator: Orange_Cremeaux
